---
title: "Searching My AI Assistant"
date: "2026-04-02"
date-modified: "2026-04-02"
version: "1.0"
description: "How to search prompts, conversations, and vignettes in this repo."
categories: [search, workflow]
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
---

# Overview

This vignette covers the practical options for searching the contents of this repo. Three tools cover the vast majority of use cases: the website (for vignettes), Positron's built-in search (for file contents), and Claude Code (for AI-assisted search). A custom-built search solution is not worth the maintenance overhead for this project.

---

# Searching Vignettes on the Website

The Quarto website (published to GitHub Pages) includes a built-in search bar that indexes all rendered vignettes. This is the easiest way to find a vignette by keyword when browsing the site.

This only covers vignettes — prompts and conversations are not rendered to the site.

---

# Searching File Contents in Positron

For keyword search across prompts and conversations, use Positron's built-in global search.

**Keyboard shortcut:** `Cmd+Shift+F`

This opens the Search panel, which searches the full text of all files in the workspace. It supports plain keywords, regular expressions, and file-type filters. This is the recommended approach for most searches — finding a prompt that mentions a specific topic, locating a conversation about a particular project, etc.

---

# AI-Assisted Search with Claude Code

For fuzzy or semantic searches ("find files related to X"), Claude Code can search the repo and reason about the results.

**Example prompts:**

- "Search my-ai-assistant for files that reference a plant-based diet."
- "Find all prompts related to EWB lesson revisions."
- "Which conversations mention the DETECT study?"

Claude Code has access to all files in the workspace and can combine keyword search with judgment about relevance — useful when you're not sure exactly what you're looking for.

---

# Quick Reference

| Goal | Tool |
|---|---|
| Find a vignette by keyword | Website search bar (GitHub Pages) |
| Search file contents by keyword | Positron `Cmd+Shift+F` |
| Fuzzy or semantic search | Claude Code prompt |
